steps.name: backend-user-schema
steps.summary: V11 마이그레이션(users 컬럼 3개 + certifications 테이블), Certification 엔티티/Repository, DTO 확장 완료

steps.name: backend-file-upload
steps.summary: FileStorageService(infra/storage), POST /users/profile-image, POST/GET/DELETE /guide/certifications, /files/** 정적 서빙 완료

steps.name: backend-guide-public-profile
steps.summary: GET /users/{userId}/profile 공개 API 완료, PublicProfileResponse(자격증+완료수+최근후기 포함)

steps.name: mobile-profile-setup
steps.summary: ProfileEditScreen(이미지업로드+자격증관리), useProfileSetup 훅, api.ts 타입 확장(CertificationResponse+PublicProfileResponse), api-client.ts 함수 추가 완료

steps.name: mobile-guide-profile-view
steps.summary: GuideProfileScreen(프로필+자격증인증뱃지+후기), usePublicProfile 훅, AppNavigator GuideProfile 라우트 등록 완료

steps.name: mobile-offer-accept-ux
steps.summary: GuideOfferCard 프로필 진입(onPressProfile)+인증뱃지(hasCertification), 오퍼 확정 Yes/No Alert 프롬프트, MatchedView 프로필 링크 완료
